deal_name: Saltchuk Resources / Great Lakes Dredge & Dock

static_events.label: Unanimously approved by the Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Board

deadline_events.label: HSR Act Filing Deadline
deadline_events.calculation: Saltchuk Resources, Inc. must make all HSR Act filings within 15 Business Days after February 10, 2026, and pay all related Governmental Entity filing fees.

deadline_events.label: Competing Proposal Notice
deadline_events.calculation: Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation must notify Saltchuk Resources, Inc. in writing within 24 hours of receipt of any Competing Proposal or proposal that would reasonably be expected to lead to a Competing Proposal.

deadline_events.label: Replacement Financing Deadline
deadline_events.calculation: If financing becomes unavailable, Saltchuk Resources, Inc. and Huron MergeCo., Inc. must use reasonable best efforts to secure alternative funds by the 5th Business Day before offer expiry.

deadline_events.label: Company Termination Fee Payment – Recommendation Change
deadline_events.calculation: Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation must pay the $36,861,914 Company Termination Fee within one Business Day after termination by Saltchuk Resources under Section 7.01(e) for a Change of Company Recommendation.

deadline_events.label: Company Termination Fee – Tail Period (Competing Proposal Consummation)
deadline_events.calculation: If the agreement is terminated in specified circumstances and Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation enters into and subsequently consummates a Competing Proposal within 12 months after termination, the $36,861,914 Company Termination Fee is payable prior to or concurrently with such consummation.

deadline_events.label: Cure Period for Breach
deadline_events.calculation: Either party has 30 days after written notice of breach to cure such breach before the non-breaching party may terminate, subject to the breach being curable before the Outside Date.

deadline_events.label: CFIUS / Foreign Investment Law Filings
deadline_events.calculation: Saltchuk Resources, Inc. and Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation must make required filings under applicable Foreign Investment Laws (including CFIUS) as promptly as practicable; no specific deadline is stated.

deadline_events.label: Shareholder Meeting Adjournment Limit
deadline_events.calculation: Adjournments limited to 10 Business Days each, not exceeding 20 Business Days aggregate without Parent's written consent; total vote delay may not exceed 25 Business Days aggregate.

deadline_events.label: Offer Price Adjustment Record Date
deadline_events.calculation: If a stock dividend or stock distribution is declared with a record date between February 10, 2026 and closing, the $17.00 offer price and merger consideration are adjusted to preserve equivalent economics.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +15 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: SEC Review Period (13E-3)
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC has 10 business days initial review; comments may follow

downstream.label: 13E-3 / Proxy Cleared by SEC
downstream.rule: SEC staff completes review; company may mail proxy

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

checklist: HSR actual filing date (Saltchuk Resources, Inc. + GLDD)
Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation stockholder meeting date
